content: Self-Refine’s iterative output polishing and Reflexion’s dynamic memory-enabled self-reflection can be combined to create a two-tier self-improvement system for autonomous LLM agents, where Self-Refine handles task-specific output tuning and Reflexion accumulates generalized lessons across multiple unrelated tasks. This creates a hybrid system that retains Self-Refine’s zero-training advantage while adding the long-term adaptive improvement that neither approach achieves alone.
